_README: Drop-in template for the weekly reader-prediction subject. Fill it in, then upload to activate predict-the-week on the cockpit: aws s3 cp deploy/current_challenge.sample.json s3://matthew-life-platform/site/config/current_challenge.json --content-type application/json . predict_metrics are the LEVERS / leading signals readers bet on — NOT weight (the outcome). 1-2 per week. After the week closes, set `result` to the truth and re-upload; the cockpit then shows 'readers said X . actual Y'. To turn predictions off, just delete the S3 object (the widget hides, fail-closed). week_id is any unique weekly string (ISO week recommended).
title: The week the running block starts
